selections.name: Fire Chat
selections.reason: Solid form recently and has placed on soft going. Well placed here.

selections.name: Reds Express
selections.reason: Consistent type with placings on soft tracks. Should be competitive.

selections.name: Xtrascent
selections.reason: Good form but carries top weight of 60kg which is a significant penalty on a Heavy 9.

selections.name: Under Wraps
selections.reason: Fitter for recent run and looks set to improve sharply.

danger_horse.name: Entirely Oak
danger_horse.reason: Placed last start and has form on soft ground.

selections.name: Hot Toddy
selections.reason: Second last start on slow going and has placed on heavy previously. Ready to peak.

selections.name: Burning Issues
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start on a slow track. Key runner from barrier 1.

selections.name: Apple Eyes
selections.reason: Made ground from midfield for third last start. Strong chance.

selections.name: Fortythreebeans
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and boxed on steadily for third last start. Nicely placed.

danger_horse.name: Iroquai
danger_horse.reason: Ran on strongly from last on the turn for third on slow going recently.

selections.name: Star Of Lily
selections.reason: Won two back and then contested an Open class race. Fitter and rates among the leading hopes.

selections.name: Andres Girl
selections.reason: Well-supported at debut and finished a close second on a slow track. Great chance to break through.

selections.name: Borata's Girl
selections.reason: Key runner on her best form, having placed second two starts back.

selections.name: Forjori
selections.reason: Not far away on debut on slow going. Can improve.

danger_horse.name: Mr Peasant
danger_horse.reason: Resuming but showed ability last prep. Likely improver.

selections.name: Reel Crystal
selections.reason: Won last start and is going from strength to strength. Very competitive.

selections.name: Justifiably
selections.reason: Second last start but carries a massive 62.5kg which is a big penalty on a Heavy 9.

selections.name: Sorry Sunshine
selections.reason: Heavy track specialist (8:2-1-0) but also suffers from the 60kg weight penalty.

selections.name: Sleeper (NZ)
selections.reason: Has won on heavy ground previously and gets a weight relief bonus.

danger_horse.name: Vogelle
danger_horse.reason: Has placed on heavy tracks and carries a light weight.

selections.name: Inspiritu
selections.reason: Second last start and looks well placed to break the ice here.

selections.name: Look Here
selections.reason: Encouraging effort two starts back on a slow track. Bold showing expected.

selections.name: Roy Kelton
selections.reason: Consistent form with a second two starts back. Right in the mix.

selections.name: Her Legacy
selections.reason: Has ability and placed on a slow track previously. Top three chance.

danger_horse.name: Meka Vibe
danger_horse.reason: Recent form is sound and can do much better this time.

selections.name: Ace Of Lace
selections.reason: Outstanding heavy track record (5:4-0-0). Will relish the conditions.

selections.name: Brial Rose
selections.reason: Another heavy track specialist (3:2-0-0). Anticipating a strong run.

selections.name: Scoffa
selections.reason: Extensive and successful heavy track form (16:4-5-1). Must be respected.

selections.name: Narcissist
selections.reason: Won last start but carries 63kg which is a severe penalty on a Heavy 9.

danger_horse.name: Big Opinion
danger_horse.reason: Profiles nicely and has placed on heavy going previously.

selections.name: Miss Stalwart (NZ)
selections.reason: Has two wins on heavy tracks and drops in weight. Can bounce back.

selections.name: Copperfield (NZ)
selections.reason: Excellent heavy track record (10:2-4-2) and ran second last start.

selections.name: County Kilkenny (IRE)
selections.reason: Proven on heavy ground (7:2-2-1). Worth another chance.

selections.name: Mathrin
selections.reason: Vast experience on heavy tracks with multiple placings. Can figure.

danger_horse.name: Cliff House
danger_horse.reason: Has won twice on heavy but carries 62.5kg which is a major negative today.
